channel.title: David Uhden Collado's Blog
channel.description: Latest articles and updates from David Uhden Collado's blog.

item.title: OpenBSD: A Secure, Robust Operating System for the Future
item.description: OpenBSD pairs security-by-design with simplicity, offering a rigorously audited system whose built-in tools and documentation favor safety over convenience.

item.title: The GPL: Paradoxes in Free Software
item.description: The GPL set out to secure software freedom, but its reciprocal restrictions can limit collaboration and create friction between open and permissive models.

item.title: Rethinking the UNIX Philosophy: Beyond Small Programs
item.description: UNIX is more than tiny tools and pipes; its real power is composability and thoughtful integration, not a simplistic blueprint for microservices.

item.title: Reinventing Operating Systems: Lessons from OpenBSD and Beyond
item.description: Enterprise OSs often cling to compatibility, while OpenBSD and Apple embrace breaking changes for security and simplicity—two paths with very different trade-offs.
